title: Profiling and Memory Management
description: Use the Profiler to find bottlenecks and avoid memory leaks.

slides.title: React Profiler
slides.content:
# Finding Slow Renders

React DevTools includes a Profiler tab. You can record interactions and see which components took long to render.

- Start profiling, perform an action, stop.
- Look at the flame graph – red means slow.
- Identify components that re‑render unnecessarily.

Use this data to target your optimisation efforts.

slides.title: Memory Leaks in React Native
Using `useRef` for Timers

quizData.question: What is a common cause of memory leaks in React Native?

options.text: Not cleaning up subscriptions in useEffect

quizData.explanation: Leaving subscriptions, timers, or event listeners active after a component unmounts causes memory leaks.
